title: 6 Pcs Balloon Weight with Ribbon, Black Star Foil Helium Balloon Weights for Birthdays, Parties, Weddings, Table Decorations and Celebrations (Red)
features: Stylish Black Balloon Weights: Secure your helium balloons with these elegant black star-shaped weights for balloons, perfect for adding a sophisticated touch to weddings, parties, and formal celebrations. These black balloon weights provide both style and functionality.

Helium Balloon Weights with Ribbon: Each pack includes two 5m rolls of matching black ribbon, creating the perfect balloon weights and ribbon combination for stunning party displays or table centerpieces.

Heavy Duty & Durable: Weighing 100g each, these balloon weight pieces are designed to hold multiple helium balloon weights securely, ensuring your decorations stay in place at both indoor and outdoor events.

Perfect for Any Celebration: Ideal for weddings, anniversaries, corporate events, or black-tie parties, these balloon string and weights double as elegant table decorations to elevate your event decor.

Easy to Use for All Events: Simply attach your balloons to the star-shaped black balloon weights using the included ribbon - a hassle-free solution for creating beautiful balloon arches, bouquets, or centerpieces.
